title: CLI query mode
description: Given a data directory and query parameters, when I run virtuus query, it should load data, execute the query, print JSON results, and exit. Spec: features/cli/query_mode.feature

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Started CLI query mode. Next: review feature spec and implement CLI path + tests. Blockers: none.
